title: IREL Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 38 Graduate, Technician, and Trade Apprentice Posts
description: The India Rare Earths Limited (IREL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 38 Graduate Apprentices, Diploma Apprentices, and Trade Apprentices. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma, B.E./B. Tech in Mechanical, Civil Engineering, ITI, M.Sc., and B.Sc. can apply for the IREL Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online...
